name: Employed Musician — T777 Art Grant Exemption and Instrument CCA
description: Complete the 2024 Canadian personal income tax return for Julianne Dubois, a professional cellist with the Vancouver Symphony Orchestra, using StudioTax 2024. Process the tax documents found at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\dubois\, including T4 employment income ($65,000) with union dues, a T4A art project grant ($5,000) with a $500 CRA grant exemption, and medical expenses ($1,800). Document T777 Musical Instrument Expenses (maintenance $1,200; insurance $800) and T777 Employed Artists' expenses (makeup/promotional $1,500). Apply Class 8 Capital Cost Allowance for her cello based on an opening UCC of $14,000 and a $3,000 addition. Save the final return to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\julianne_dubois.24t.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4044 (Employment Expenses) 2024 - Artists and Musicians
